reviews.comment:
El personal no atendió bien. Llegamos y charlaban entre ellos. Después de aproximadamente 10 minutos fue que comenzaron a atender. A la hora de pagar, no te indican ninguna promoción o preguntar si se posee la tarjeta serviclub. De verdad que deberían supervisar a su personal.

(Translated by Google)
The staff was terrible. We arrived and they were chatting amongst themselves. It took about 10 minutes for them to start helping us. When it came time to pay, they didn't mention any promotions or ask if we had a Serviclub card. They really should supervise their staff.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12305613765678893423/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURvNTRLY1lBEAE
